mapper.select: SELECT provider_id, source, external_id_type, external_id FROM movie_external_ids WHERE movie_id = #{movieId} ORDER BY provider_id ASC, source ASC, external_id_type ASC
SELECT provider_id, source, genre FROM movie_genres WHERE movie_id = #{movieId} ORDER BY provider_id ASC, source ASC, genre ASC
SELECT provider_id, source, person_name, role, billing_order FROM movie_people WHERE movie_id = #{movieId} ORDER BY billing_order ASC, role ASC, person_name ASC
